text: Display 5 predefined users (1 PM, 4 engineers) on launch screen

coveredBy.testName: displays Taskify heading and five user cards on launch

text: No password or login prompt required
Clicking a user navigates to the main view with project list

coveredBy.testName: clicking a user navigates to the project list

text: Three sample projects available for selection
suggestion: Add test: 'project list displays exactly 3 sample projects' — verify project count and names on the project list page

text: Four Kanban columns: To Do, In Progress, In Review, Done

coveredBy.testName: board renders exactly 4 Kanban columns with correct headings

text: Clicking a project opens its Kanban board

coveredBy.testName: each column contains its expected task cards
clicking a card opens the task detail modal

text: Drag and drop cards between columns to change status

coveredBy.testName: move a card to the next column
move a card backward to the previous column
card remains in the board after drag (no data loss)

text: Cards assigned to the current user highlighted in a different color

coveredBy.testName: cards assigned to the current user have a distinct background color
card highlight updates when switching users
unassigned cards use the default (non-highlighted) style

text: Assign a user to a task card
suggestion: Add test: 'assign a user to an unassigned task card' — open card detail, select assignee, verify card updates with new user and highlight changes

text: Leave unlimited comments on a card

coveredBy.testName: add a new comment to a task
own comment shows Edit and Delete buttons
cannot edit or delete comments made by other users
delete own comment removes it from the list
cannot edit or delete comments made by other users
